title: Making Plans
subtitle: Making Plans — and How Filipinos Say No Without Saying No

wrong_answer_tracking.behaviour: Wrong answers go to back of current session queue.
wrong_answer_tracking.wrong_count_usage: Feed to Gemini system prompt for AI Practice.

alam_mo_ba: 'Sige, tignan ko' (okay, I'll see) is the Filipino soft no. Direct refusal can feel confrontational, so 'baka pwede next time' (maybe next time) or 'depende' (depends) are used to decline without closing a door. Learning to read these is as important as learning the words themselves.
completion_reward.alam_mo_ba_display: Show 1 random fun fact on lesson completion screen.

progress_ring.display: Ring animates from X/5 to (X+1)/5 on session completion
